hero.heading: Founder member scheme

feature_1.heading: Calling 100 visionary donors to make a difference
feature_1.description: We seek 100 passionate individuals willing to contribute £100 or more. Your support will fuel our groundbreaking work and transform potential into reality.

feature_2.heading: Your moment awaits
feature_2.form_success_message: Invitation request received. Welcome to our mission

items.quote: "This scheme represents true innovation in philanthropy"
items.name: James Carter

faq.heading: FAQs
faq.intro: Find answers to common questions about our founder member scheme

items.question: How does the scheme work?
items.answer: The scheme invites 100 donors to contribute £100 or more within 100 days. Each donor receives special recognition as a founding supporter of MMTUK.

items.question: What are the benefits?
items.answer: Benefits include recognition as a founding supporter in our materials and direct impact on our mission.

items.question: Can I donate more?
items.answer: Absolutely. We welcome donations above the £100 minimum. Larger contributions provide greater support to our initiatives.

items.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
items.answer: We recommend consulting your tax advisor. Many donations to charitable initiatives qualify for tax deductions.

items.question: How will my donation be used?
items.answer: Every pound directly supports our core mission of creating sustainable social impact across communities.

faq.contact_intro: Our team is ready to answer any additional questions
